goal: Remove hard-skip in post_commit_graph when .cnogo/.venv is missing; fall through to current-interpreter indexing

tasks.name: Remove venv-missing early return, fall through to direct indexing
microSteps: Run test_reindex_creates_graph_db — expect FAIL (graph.db not created due to hard-skip)
In workflow_hooks.py, remove the if-block at lines 545-553 that returns early when venv_python does not exist
Add advisory warning before the fallback indexing block: print a note to stderr that venv is recommended but continuing with current interpreter
tasks.action: Remove the `if not venv_python.exists(): ... return 0` block (lines 545-553). Replace with an advisory warning that does NOT return early — just prints to stderr and falls through to the existing import/index block below. The existing try/except at line 567 already catches ImportError if kuzu is unavailable, so no new error handling needed.

commitMessage: fix(hooks): remove hard-skip in post_commit_graph, fallback to current interpreter when venv missing
